---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for RailTwin-X Lite
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Stormynubee
---

## Feature Proposal

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...").

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain the logic and flow of the enhancement.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockup designs, or screenshots about the feature request here.
